name: MIT AI Risk Repository
description: Living database of AI risks compiled from a comprehensive literature review. Organizes ~700+ identified risks across multiple taxonomies (causal, domain, etc.). Used by researchers, policymakers, and practitioners as a reference catalog of documented AI risks.
relationToCloudSecurity: AI risks identified often have cloud-hosting implications when AI is deployed in cloud environments.
relationToAISecurity: One of the most comprehensive public catalogs of AI risks. Useful for risk assessments and policy work.

license.notes: MIT AI Risk Repository is released under CC BY 4.0 per the project site.

current_extraction.notes: Direct CSV download from airisk.mit.edu. Multiple CSV files map to different taxonomies/views of the underlying risk database.

notes: Reference catalog of AI risks. Snapshot dated by download time.
